source_file: SCHUFA (Germany) Reports 2023 Full Year Revenue UP 4.2% – Invests in Transformation _ BIIA.com.txt
text:
Bartels was BIIA’s general manager and Editor-in-Chief
                                          from 2005 to 2022. Semi-retired, he continued as Editor-
                                          in Chief and Head of Information Resources (Website
                                          and Newsletter) and retired from these positions in
                                          September 2024. Bartels is a business information
                                          development specialist with over 50 years of global
                                          experience. He spent most of his information career in
                                          senior management positions at Dun & Bradstreet. He
                                          has served as volunteer in major industry associations
                                          in Europe and the USA. Joachim C. Bartels owns Intrepid
                                          Explorers, Inc. a business information consultancy. The
                                          BIIA website is a treasure trove of knowledge
                                          approaching 16,000 documents of industry
                                          announcements, use cases, benchmarks and best
                                          demonstrated practices. BIIA members receive regular
                                          news alerts on key developments in the industry and
                                          the regulatory environment. The BIIA readership is
                                          widespread: between 4 to 5 thousand unique visitors
                                          access BIIA.com per month.
                                                                                                                                             
